## Description

Briefly describe what this pull request changes and why. Link any related
issues (for example, `Closes #123`).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (a non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (a non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (a fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor, chore or tooling (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] The branch name follows the convention (`feat/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, `chore/`, `refactor/`).
- [ ] Commits follow the Conventional Commits format.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds.
- [ ] New or changed behavior is covered by tests.
- [ ] User-facing strings are in Spanish (`apps/web/messages/es.json`); code, comments and docs are in English.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior or setup changed.

## How to test

Steps a reviewer can follow to verify the change.

## Screenshots

If this changes the UI, include before and after screenshots.
